risk.reason: Depending on the system being scanned, aide could cause system sluggishness during the period it performs its scan.

audit_config.rules:

/usr/sbin/autrace p+i+n+u+g+s+b+acl+xattrs+sha512
/usr/sbin/augenrules p+i+n+u+g+s+b+acl+xattrs+sha512
